region.depth_slices: 26 slices centered at mid-depth (lo = max(0, d//2 - 13))
region.note: predict a probability map over exactly this 4096x4096 level-2 region

ground_truth.origin: 2023 Grand-Prize-era human ink annotation (villa ink-detection train_scrolls inklabels) registered onto the re-flattened SOTA geometry

registration.method: obj-exact: original.obj vt (386108 vertices), NN bridge via on-7.91um tifxyz (same old-scan frame), vt convention rowHv_colu (selected by teacher-enrichment among 4 discrete candidates, disclosed; orientation verified visually)
registration.validation_basis: enrichment-gated (5.05 >> 3.0 threshold); letterforms visually verified in overlay
registration.caveat: ~8-voxel median correspondence residual smears stroke edges at 64px scale; scores are lower bounds on true agreement

role: TRAIN-EXPOSED for the distilled baseline models listed in baselines/ (disclosed); clean for any model not trained on this segment
